violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the (can opener ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2025
